title: American-Style Fried Rice
description: A classic comfort food dish made with fried rice, scrambled eggs, and your favorite vegetables. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced courgettes and cook until they start to soften.
Push the courgettes to one side of the pan, crack in the eggs and scramble them until cooked through.
Mix the eggs with the courgettes.
Add the crunchy fried rice to the pan, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Stir-fry the rice mixture for about 5 minutes, until heated through and starting to brown.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
